sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57603" key="kisswto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κισσ-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n57603.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">decked with ivy</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">νεβρίς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.172</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
